title: malaxis thwaitesii
intro: Malaxis thwaitesii, also known as the Sri Lankan Malaxis, is a type of orchid native to Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malaxis thwaitesii include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. Malaxis thwaitesii is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
